Document:
# Skill Trees & Distribution
Skill trees define the progression paths available to each species. Each tree contains tiers of skills that must be learned in order.
## Tree Structure
Tree: Pyromancy T1: FireBolt (1 point) T2: FireBall (2 points, requires T1) T3: Inferno (3 points, requires T2)
## Species & Trees
Each species has access to different skill trees: - [bold]Humans[/bold] — Craftsmanship trees (smithing, alchemy, etc.) - [bold]Elves[/bold] — Magic trees (Pyromancy, Hydrosophistry, etc.) - [bold]Dwarves[/bold] — Combat and crafting trees
## Point Allocation
Characters receive points at character creation and through gameplay. Points are spent to unlock skill tiers.
[bold]Important:[/bold] Spending points on skills may grant stat modifiers. These modifiers count toward the stat cap, so overflow is possible. See [textlink="Spell Fallback System" link="OE14_DEV_Stats_Fallback"] for details.
## Content Under Construction
Full skill tree documentation coming soon. The skill definitions are in: [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Skills/[/mono]
